Code with Cisco 2026.title: Code with Cisco 2026
Code with Cisco 2026.summary:
• online assessment, with shortlisted candidates invited to a 2-day code-a-thon at the Cisco Bangalore campus. Participants may also be considered for Spring Internship and Full-Time opportunities at Cisco.
• * No active backlogs/arrears at the time of registration
• * Willingness to travel to Bangalore if shortlisted
• * Shortlisting for Code-a-thon
• * Interview opportunities for high-performing candidates
• Important Dates:
• Interested students must apply through the provided Google form link by 7th June, 12 PM.
• Google Link for Registration: https://forms.gle/jgE5xQcusGCFnC4f9
• Centre: BIT Mesra | | Visit Link

Amazon ML Summer School 2026 \u2013 Regi.title: Amazon ML Summer School 2026 – Registrations Open
Amazon ML Summer School 2026 \u2013 Regi.summary:
• Amazon India invites eligible students to apply for Amazon ML Summer School 2026, a free virtual learning program designed to provide in-depth exposure to Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence through sessions conducted by Amazon Scientists.
• Registration link attached below
• Last Date to Register:
• Interested and eligible students are encouraged to register before the deadline.
• Centre: BIT Mesra | | Visit Link

HackVega 2.0 \u2013 National Hackathon.title: HackVega 2.0 – National Hackathon
HackVega 2.0 \u2013 National Hackathon.summary:
• This is to inform all the students of the 2026, 2027, 2028, and 2029 graduating batches about HackVega 2.0, a nationwide hackathon aimed at identifying and recognizing innovative tech talent across the country.
• Important Dates
• • Registration Deadline: 15 June 2026
• • Challenge Timeline: 20 June 2026 – 27 June 2026
• Registration Link
• All interested and eligible students are encouraged to register and participate in this exciting opportunity to showcase their technical and problem-solving skills.
• Centre: BIT Mesra | | Visit Link
